name: sistema-veterinaria-comercial

scripts.build:production: npm run check:release && npm run check:deploy && vite build --mode production
scripts.qa:release: npm run check:release && npm run build
scripts.build:hosting: npm run check:deploy && vite build --mode production
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build:hosting && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:all: npm run build:hosting && firebase deploy --only firestore:rules,firestore:indexes,hosting

description: Sistema veterinaria comercial: Fase 6 deploy comercial, App Check, QA final, dominio, Hosting y manuales de cliente
